updates.description: Initial dataset compiled from Labome Cell Markers, T/B Cell Markers, Macrophage Markers, and Stem Cell Markers pages. 121 cell types across 12 tissue systems and 27 organs with 706 human markers.

added_cell_types: Integumentary: keratinocyte, epidermal-stem-cell, langerhans-cell, dermal-fibroblast, dermal-macrophage, dermal-dc, white-adipocyte, brown-adipocyte, beige-adipocyte, adipose-derived-stem-cell

Nervous: pyramidal-cell, astrocyte-type1, astrocyte-type2, purkinje-cell, choroid-plexus-cell, microglia, oligodendrocyte, ependymal-cell, schwann-cell-myelinating, schwann-cell-nonmyelinating, satellite-cell, enteric-glial-cell
Cardiovascular: cardiomyocyte, cardiac-macrophage, vascular-endothelial-cell, lymphatic-endothelial-cell, smooth-muscle-cell, pericyte
Respiratory: alveolar-type1-cell, alveolar-type2-cell, alveolar-macrophage, bronchial-epithelial-cell, neuroendocrine-cell-pulmonary

Digestive: parietal-cell, chief-cell, enterocyte, paneth-cell, intestinal-stem-cell, tuft-cell, goblet-cell, colonocyte, hepatocyte, kupffer-cell, liver-sinusoidal-endothelial-cell, hepatic-stellate-cell, acinar-cell, beta-cell, alpha-cell, delta-cell

Lymphatic/Immune: hematopoietic-stem-cell, neutrophil, eosinophil, basophil, monocyte-classical, monocyte-nonclassical, mast-cell-bone-marrow, dn-thymocyte, dp-thymocyte, thymic-tuft-cell, splenic-macrophage, tfh-cell, tfr-cell, follicular-dc
Musculoskeletal: myocyte-skeletal, muscle-satellite-cell, mesenchymal-stem-cell, osteoblast, osteoclast
Reproductive: granulosa-cell, large-luteal-cell, germ-cell-ovary, sertoli-cell, germ-cell-testis, prostate-epithelial-cell

Circulating Immune: naive-cd4-t-cell, naive-cd8-t-cell, th1-cell, th2-cell, th17-cell, treg-cell, th2a-cell, th9-cell, memory-cd4-central, memory-cd4-effector, memory-cd8-effector, tissue-resident-memory-t, gamma-delta-t-cell, mait-cell, naive-follicular-b-cell, marginal-zone-b-cell, b1-cell, memory-b-cell-preswitch, memory-b-cell-postswitch, plasmablast, plasma-cell, regulatory-b-cell, nk-cell-cd56dim, nk-cell-cd56bright, m1-macrophage, m2a-macrophage, m2b-macrophage, m2c-macrophage, m2d-macrophage, conventional-dc-cd8, conventional-dc-cd8neg, plasmacytoid-dc, mature-dc, embryonic-stem-cell, ipsc, cancer-stem-cell, neural-stem-cell, jurkat-cell

updates.description: Content gap fixes and SVG redraws at textbook histology quality. Added citations table, normalized 53 marker names with expression_level field, reconciled 24 microstructure ID mismatches, split chest body_map_region into chest-left/chest-right, redrew all SVGs (body map, 25 microanatomy diagrams, 27 organ icons), added favicon and loading spinner CSS.

details.marker_normalizations: 53 markers renamed: suffix markers (CD14++ → CD14 high), Greek letters (Alpha-SMA → ACTA2), gene symbol replacements (cTnI → TNNI3). Full list in spec 20-marker-normalization.md.
details.microstructure_id_reconcile: 24 microstructures had id ≠ svg_region_id. Removed svg_region_id field; SVG element IDs now match canonical microstructure IDs. Full list in spec 24-microstructure-id-reconcile.md.
details.chest_region_split: Cardiovascular body_map_region changed from 'chest' to 'chest-left'; Respiratory changed from 'chest' to 'chest-right'.
details.svg_redraws: Body map redrawn with correct anatomical proportions (7.5 head heights, anterior view). 25 microanatomy SVGs redrawn at Junqueira's Histology quality. 27 organ icons redrawn at textbook anatomical quality.
details.citations: Citation records added to metadata.citations[] with authors, title, journal, year, doi, pmid, url, source_page. Scraped from Labome source pages at build time.
details.expression_levels: New expression_levels field on markers maps marker name to 'high'/'low'/'positive'/'negative'. Derived from suffix markers (++, +, -) during normalization.
